achievements.description: Complete Chapter VIII in any difficulty.

achievements.description: Complete Chapter IX in any difficulty.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.description: Complete Chapter X in any difficulty.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.description: Complete Chapter XI in any difficulty.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.description: Complete Chapter XII in any difficulty.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Always An End
achievements.description: Complete Chapter XIII in any difficulty.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: First Blood
achievements.description: Obtain your first weapon and make your first kill.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Assassin's Instinct
achievements.description: Perform a cinematic assassination.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Clean Steps, No Wounds
achievements.description: In Chapter III - Level 3, do not fall into the sewers or take any damage.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Brains Over Brawn, the Pen Outmatches the Sword
achievements.description: In Chapter III - Level 2, defeat Badr without taking any damage in medium difficulty or above.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Prisoner of Stone, Breaks Free and Become a Prisoner of Fate
achievements.description: In Chapter IV - Level 2, kill the Templar prisoner, eliminate all enemies and solve the puzzle in the next room without taking more than 2 hits in medium difficulty or above.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Red Blue, Blue Yellow
achievements.description: In Chapter VI - Level 2, kill two Templars near the large circular puzzle without taking more than 2 hits in medium difficulty or above.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: The so-called 'Master of the Tower' Fell Like a Stone
achievements.description: In Chapter VI - Level 3, kill the Commander without taking any damage in medium difficulty or above.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: A Silent Shadow
achievements.description: In Chapter IX, levels 3 and 4, sneak through the Crusader camp without being spotted.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Crossbow Master
achievements.description: In Chapter VIII - Level 3, kill 12 enemies using only the crossbow without dying.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Vanished Like a Phantom
achievements.description: In Chapter IX - Level 1, use the smoke bomb to distract soldiers and kill at least 2 of them with the crossbow before the smoke dissipates.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Sharp Enough!
achievements.description: Fully upgrade your weapon.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Overpowered Instinct
achievements.description: Fully upgrade your lifebar.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Never Leave a Treasure Behind
achievements.description: In Chapter VII - Level 1, find and open a hidden chest.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: Orb Collector
achievements.description: Collect 650 Orbs.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude

achievements.title: The Prequel
achievements.description: Beat the game in hard difficulty without lifebar upgrades.
achievements.author: TheWTFdude
